name: Push Up
instructions: Start in a high plank position.
Lower your chest toward the floor.
Press back to the starting position.
tips: Keep your body in a straight line.

name: Bodyweight Squat
description: A lower-body squat pattern performed without external load.
instructions: Stand with feet around shoulder width.
Sit your hips down and back.
Drive through your feet to stand tall.
tips: Track knees in line with toes.
